response.justification: Bogdan Szabo is a highly experienced full-stack engineer with a strong background in TypeScript, Node.js, and web/distributed systems, but he does not meet the core mandatory requirements for this role. His C++ exposure is limited to roughly six months at National Instruments in 2014–2015 and a student thesis project, far short of the required 5–10 years of professional C++ on Windows. He has no demonstrated fixed-income, capital markets, or investment banking domain expertise, and SQL/Oracle/SQL Server experience is absent from his meaningful work history. The gap between his profile and the role's hard requirements is too large to bridge.
strengths: Strong software craftsmanship practices (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development) demonstrated across multiple roles
Financial-sector adjacent experience at RIDE Capital, showing exposure to regulated, investment-related product environments
Java background and CI/CD experience partially satisfy optional desirable skills
concerns: C++ experience is negligible (~6 months, 2014–2015) versus the 5–10 year mandatory requirement
Zero evidence of fixed-income, capital markets, or investment banking domain knowledge
No meaningful SQL Server or Oracle experience; primary database work is MongoDB and general SQL

key_factors.factor: No capital markets / fixed income domain knowledge
Strong engineering practices and CI/CD familiarity
